fields.name: status
fields.description: Current lifecycle status of the record.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Enforce status lifecycle rules?
overridableConfigKeys.description: Validate and apply status transitions against the configured table. Off by default.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: lifecycle, statuses, states, stages, workflow, status transitions, enforce, enable, apply

overridableConfigKeys.label: What status do new records start in?
overridableConfigKeys.description: The status assigned when a record is first created.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: starting state, default status, first stage, initial state

overridableConfigKeys.label: What are the possible statuses?
overridableConfigKeys.description: The complete set of statuses a record can hold.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: states, stages, phases, statuses, lifecycle, workflow steps

overridableConfigKeys.label: Which field holds the status?
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: state field, stage field, status column, lifecycle field

overridableConfigKeys.label: Target entity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity name whose status field this lifecycle drives (e.g. 'Contract'). Rebind per composition. No entity-ref config type exists yet, so this plain string is not auto-threaded by entity rename — keep it equal to the trait's `-> Entity` rebind by hand.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Which status moves are allowed?
overridableConfigKeys.description: Legal transitions as { from, to, event, label }. Only matching moves are applied.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: edges, allowed moves, status flow, workflow transitions
